description: Elevate your advocacy campaigns and social justice initiatives with a professional, clean, and minimal email template. Designed to enhance community conversations and support, this template is perfect for non-profit organizations, social work, and events aimed at stopping hate. It's ideal for scheduling marches and protests, promoting social justice causes like BLM, Stop Asian Hate, and supporting Hispanic communities. Amid the ongoing fight against coronavirus, it serves as a powerful voice for strength and unity. It reflects the vibrant spirit of the 'black and yellow' symbol, advocating for Asian and Black communities. This email template is your ally in your journey towards social change. It's not just a template, it's a platform for your advocacy.
short_description: Elevate your social justice campaigns with our professional email template. Ideal for non-profits, social work, and events advocating for BLM, Stop Asian Hate, and Hispanic communities. Amid coronavirus, it's a voice for unity and strength. Not just a template, but a platform for change.

designer.description:
My name is Allison Valenzuela, I'm a Midwest based graphic designer. Born and raised in Davenport, Iowa and currently living in Moline. I graduated from the University of Iowa with a BFA in Graphic Design and a Certificate of Entrepreneurial Management in May 2015.

Taking on a creative challenge, working hard to make ideas a reality and puzzle piecing things together is what I do best. I always sport a positive and can-do attitude. I love doing freelance, so if you've got a project that you'd like to get in touch with me about, send me a message!

html_data:
Our communities stand united against racism.

Hate against Asian American Pacific Islander communities, Black Communities, and Hispanic communities has risen during the COVID-19 pandemic.

 

Together, we can stop it.
